title: Freeze Focus Dance
description: A freeze-dance game with tiny attention missions that make holding still as playful as moving wildly.
learningGoals: Practice stopping the body on a spoken signal
Build impulse control and body-stop regulation
Sustain attention during a short still moment
Release energy through joyful whole-body movement
interactionModel: follow automatic spoken dance and freeze signals; use the large pause control whenever a break is needed
feedbackModel: DJ-style spoken cues with pop, boing, silly, sparkle, and tada SFX; every completed set celebrates both energetic movement and focused stillness

modes.title: Freeze Missions
modes.skill: attention and balance while holding still

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
